isolation.notes: No shared mutable state — all data is hardcoded, cart is client-side per session

assertions.title: FAQ page renders with categories and accordions

steps.expected: FAQ page loads with title and content
steps.observed: FAQ page loaded with 'FAQ | Soul Good' title

steps.expected: Category navigation visible (General, Meal Plans, Delivery, Subscription, Dietary)
steps.observed: All 5 category buttons visible in sidebar: General, Meal Plans, Delivery, Subscription, Dietary

steps.expected: Accordion questions displayed for each category
steps.observed: Multiple accordion questions visible across all categories (e.g., 'What is Soul Good?', 'Who is Chef Kyla?', 'Where do you deliver?')

steps.expected: Delivery category highlighted, delivery questions shown
steps.observed: Delivery category highlighted with terracotta accent, page scrolled to delivery section with 4 delivery questions
Answer expanded: 'We deliver throughout the Greater Los Angeles area — from Long Beach to Malibu, the Valley to DTLA, and everywhere in between.' Arrow icon rotated to indicate expanded state
Contact page loaded with 'Contact | Soul Good' title and 'Get In Touch' hero section

steps.expected: Name, email, subject, and message fields present
steps.observed: All fields present: Name (text input), Email (text input), Subject (select dropdown with options: General, Meal Plans, Catering, Events, Other), Message (textarea)
'SEND MESSAGE' button visible below the form
Contact information section with email (contact@soulgood.com), social links (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube), and business hours

assertions.title: Contact form validates and shows confirmation

steps.action: Navigate to /contact and click SEND MESSAGE with empty fields
steps.expected: Validation errors shown for required fields
steps.observed: Validation errors displayed: 'Name is required' (red border + text), 'Email is required' (red underline + text), 'Please select a subject' (red underline + text), 'Message is required' (implied, below viewport)

steps.action: Set subject to 'General' via JavaScript (native select timeout workaround)
Fill message field with test text
steps.observed: Message field filled with 'This is a test message for validation.'
Success message displayed: envelope icon, 'Message Sent!' heading, 'Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24-48 hours.' text, and 'SEND ANOTHER MESSAGE' button

evidence.network: No API calls (form logs to console)

frictions.description: Native HTML <select> dropdown times out with agent-browser 'select' command as documented in AGENTS.md. Required JavaScript eval workaround to set subject field value.
frictions.resolution: Used JavaScript eval with nativeSetter and dispatchEvent to set select value to 'General' and trigger change event

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. FAQ page correctly displays category navigation and accordion Q&A with expand/collapse behavior. Contact page has all required form fields (name, email, subject, message) and submit button. Contact form validates required fields with clear error messages and shows a success confirmation after valid submission.
